# Beautiful Graph performance fixture

Generated by `tools/benchmark-harness.js` from the approved functional baseline.

- `topology.json` contains stable hashes instead of vault paths or note titles.
- `baseline.json` contains the fixed workload timing samples and environment metadata.
- `rapid-drag.json` contains the final three-run production-path rapid-drag evidence.
- The final benchmark must use the same harness, topology, viewport, warm-up, run length, sample floor, and p95 calculation.
